name: HMS Dochet (T 286)
events: 30 Jan 1944 HMS Unseen (Lt. M.L.C. Crawford, DSC and Bar, RN) departed Portland for Portsmouth where she arrived later the same day. She was escorted by HMS Dochet (T/Lt. G.C. Wood, RNVR). (1)
7 Apr 1945 HMS Storm (T/A/Lt.Cdr. E.P. Young, DSO, DSC, RNVR) departed Falmouth for Portsmouth. She was escorted by HMS Dochet (T/Lt. G.C. Wood, RNVR). (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
